title: Rich Light Dutch Yeast Pancakes
description: These rich light pancakes are perfect for a brunch, featuring an instant yeast batter and dairy-free options to suit various dietary needs.

ingredients.name: Coconut Oil or Melted Coconut Spread

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the Instant Yeast with milk and water. Stir in salt and optional toppings.
Stir in coconut oil or spread until thoroughly mixed into the liquid mixture.
Let the batter sit at room temperature for about 15 minutes to allow the yeast to activate and foam slightly.
Preheat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and lightly grease with more coconut oil if preferred.
Pour ¼ cup of batter onto the hot pan and cook until bubbles form on top, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and continue cooking until golden brown on both sides.
